nasb.text: Mephibosheth had a young son whose name was Mica. And all who lived in the house of Ziba were servants to Mephibosheth.

esv.text: And Mephibosheth had a young son, whose name was Mica. And all who lived in Ziba’s house became Mephibosheth’s servants.

cnv.text: 米非波設有一個小兒子，名叫米迦。住在洗巴家裡的人，都作了米非波設的僕人。

ccb.text: 米非波设有一个小儿子名叫米迦。洗巴家中的人都做了米非波设的仆人。
